schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

schemas.name: GST Cancellation & Revocation
schemas.description: GST registration cancellation and revocation services. Voluntary cancellation (REG-16), suo moto cancellation defence, revocation application. Virtual Auditor.

schemas.name: GST Registration Cancellation & Revocation
schemas.description: GST registration cancellation and revocation services. Voluntary cancellation (REG-16), suo moto cancellation defence, revocation application. Virtual Auditor.

schemas.name: GST Registration Cancellation & Revocation
schemas.description: GST registration cancellation and revocation services. Voluntary cancellation (REG-16), suo moto cancellation defence, revocation application. Virtual Auditor.

step.text: Officer verifies and issues REG-19 order

mainEntity.name: When can I cancel GST registration voluntarily?

acceptedAnswer.text: When business is discontinued, transferred, or turnover falls below threshold. File REG-16 and GSTR-10 (final return) within 3 months of cancellation.

mainEntity.name: My GST was cancelled suo moto. Can I revoke?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. File Form GST REG-21 within 30 days of cancellation order. Clear all pending returns and pay outstanding tax before applying. We handle the revocation process including return backlog clearance.

File GST REG-16 on the GST portal. Reason for cancellation required. Clear all pending returns and liabilities. Pay final tax. Officer verifies and issues cancellation order in REG-19. Effective from date specified in order.

mainEntity.name: Can cancelled GST registration be revoked?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. File application for revocation in REG-21 within 30 days of cancellation order (if cancelled by officer). Suo motu cancelled registrations can be revoked if all pending returns and taxes are filed and paid.

mainEntity.name: Is final return (GSTR-10) mandatory after cancellation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. File GSTR-10 within 3 months of cancellation date or date of cancellation order, whichever is later. Contains details of stock held, ITC reversed, and tax payable. Penalty for non-filing: ₹200/day.

mainEntity.name: What are grounds for compulsory cancellation by officer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Non-filing of returns for 6 consecutive months (regular) or 3 consecutive quarters (QRMP). Business discontinued. Obtained registration by fraud. Non-commencement of business within 6 months of voluntary registration.

mainEntity.name: What happens to input tax credit on stock after cancellation?

acceptedAnswer.text: ITC on inputs held in stock and capital goods must be reversed in GSTR-10 as per Section 29(5). Pay tax on stock at applicable rate or ITC amount, whichever is higher.
